locationUsed.description: True when an IP-based location estimate was applied (consent granted and resolved). When false, servers are in Locate proximity order and distanceKm is absent.

servers.description: The server velox would select plus next-nearest alternatives, about 5 total, in proximity order.

distanceKm.description: Great-circle distance in km when a location estimate is available; null otherwise.

selected.description: True for the single server velox would use for a real run.
